firstCard.title: 1. Minecraft
firstCard.desc: A production-ready Minecraft Java server packaged with Docker & Compose. Persistent worlds, env-based config, and simple testing—my first cloud build from the DevSecOps course, made reliable and repeatable.

secondCard.title: 2. Clone (Container)
secondCard.desc: A lightweight app clone running in Docker. Multi-stage build, Docker Compose, and env-based config—fast spins, reproducible deploys, and simple health checks.

thirdCard.title: 3. WordPress hosting
thirdCard.desc: WordPress on Docker/Compose. Persistent volumes for DB and uploads, .env-driven config, and hassle-free updates without data loss.
